summary: Tested UI/UX improvements for RetailPro Dashboard and New Sale pages. New Sale page correctly implements 'Select a Customer First' flow with customer selection modal showing phone search with +255 country code. Dashboard components (QuickActions, RecentActivityFeed, TopSellingProducts, LowStockAlert) are implemented. Backend permission issue prevents sales_staff from searching/creating customers.

critical.issue: Sales staff (SALES_STAFF role) receives 403 Forbidden when searching customers - blocks customer selection flow for sales roles
Sales staff cannot create new customers - returns 403 Forbidden

integration_issues.flow: New Sale - Customer selection for sales_staff
integration_issues.issue: Customer search returns 'No customer found' even for existing customers due to 403 backend error

new_sale_page.select_customer_first_message: PASSED - Shows 'Select a Customer First' with subtitle 'Choose or add a customer to start the sale'
new_sale_page.select_customer_button: PASSED - Blue button with person icon opens customer modal
new_sale_page.customer_modal_phone_search: PASSED - Shows +255 country code with phone input field
new_sale_page.customer_modal_add_new: PASSED - 'Add New Customer' button appears when no customer found
new_sale_page.add_customer_form: PASSED - Shows Name*, Phone* (with +255), Email (optional), Cancel and Save & Select buttons
new_sale_page.browse_products_button: BLOCKED - Cannot verify as customer selection fails for sales_staff
new_sale_page.scan_barcode_button: BLOCKED - Cannot verify as customer selection fails for sales_staff

dashboard_components.quick_actions_component: VERIFIED - Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/QuickActions.tsx with data-testid='quick-actions'
dashboard_components.recent_activity_feed: VERIFIED - Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/RecentActivityFeed.tsx with data-testid='recent-activity-feed'

dashboard_web_view.note: Dashboard web view (width > 768px) includes QuickActions, RecentActivityFeed, TopSellingProducts, LowStockAlert based on code review

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Backend permission issue - sales_staff role cannot search customers (403 Forbidden on GET /api/customers?search=)
FIX CRITICAL: Backend permission issue - sales_staff role cannot create customers (403 Forbidden on POST /api/customers)
VERIFY: Test Browse Products and Scan Barcode buttons after fixing backend permissions
VERIFY: Test Dashboard QuickActions, RecentActivity, TopSelling with admin user on web view
critical_code_review_comments: Backend customers API needs role-based permission fix for sales_staff and front_desk roles
Code implementation is correct - 'Browse Products' and 'Scan Barcode' buttons conditionally render when customer_name is set (line 823-850 in cart.tsx)

success_rate.frontend: 70% - New Sale UI verified but customer selection flow blocked by backend 403 errors

seed_data_creation: Created customer 'Test Customer John' with phone +255712345678 via admin API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend permission issue blocks sales_staff from customer operations. Test with admin user to verify full customer selection flow and 'Browse Products'/'Scan Barcode' buttons. Dashboard QuickActions, RecentActivityFeed, TopSellingProducts are in WebDashboard (web view with width > 768px). Components have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
